art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026: Total sales reached $59.6B in 2025, a 4% YoY increase, signaling modest market recovery.
The dealer sector saw a 2% increase ($34.8B), while public auction sales jumped 9% to $20.7B, outperforming expectations.
US remains the market leader ($26B, 44% share), while France grows its EU market share to 8% ($4.5B).
Art Fairs return to prominence, accounting for 35% of dealer turnover; online-only sales cooled to $9.2B.
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 (Mar 27-29) features 242 galleries, new 'Echoes' sector, and major off-site installations.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious optimism; 43% of dealers expect growth in 2026 as market stabilizes.
market_summary.key_drivers: Strong auction performance (+9%), resurgence of in-person fairs, and blue-chip resilience.
market_summary.trend: Correction in contemporary segments offset by Modern/Old Master gains; pivot toward experiential and fair-based sales models.
